title: Consent Audit Log
description: Append-only, capped journal of consent state transitions per scope. Rendered by the `View consent history` panel in the Privacy tab of screen 56-options and consumed by support / regulator queries. Persisted in IndexedDB `hr-profile.audit` per `data-inventory.md`; wiped by `WIPE_LOCAL_DATA scope=profile|all`. Distinct from `audit-log-entry.schema.json` (which carries `ERASURE` / `REPLAY_EXPORT` / `POLICY_ACCEPTED` / `OPT_IN_TOGGLED` events): this schema is the per-scope consent-state journal that backs GDPR Art. 7(1) record-keeping.

capacity.description: Ring-buffer cap. The runtime drops the oldest entry when `entries.length > capacity`.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 wall-clock at the moment of the transition.

policyVersion.description: Mirrors the policy version in effect at the time of the transition, per `docs/architecture/onboarding.md`.

errorId.description: Optional UUID v4 carried when the transition was reached via an error path (e.g. import-failure) so support can correlate.
